programs.title: Mystery ER
programs.desc: A swimmer gets attacks of near-paralytic exhaustion, after which his urine becomes strangely dark; when he has a heart attack, a doctor suspects something sinister.

programs.title: Mystery ER
programs.desc: A college student comes down with a purple rash that literally spreads before his eyes; as his health deteriorates, the doctor must race to find the cause.

programs.title: Mystery ER
programs.desc: A young child blisters after exposure to a few minutes of sun; Doctors make a discovery that the child's inability to sweat is one symptom of a mysterious disorder.

programs.title: Skin Tight
programs.desc: Julie's globs of excess skin cause her to recoil from the touch of her children; Andrew shed 300-lbs. by spending every spare moment in the gym, but is now engulfed in empty skin that's killing his dream of body-building.

programs.title: Skin Tight
programs.desc: Megan lost weight after being bullied in high school but is still constantly tormented when she sees her dramatic loose skin in the mirror; Ashley lost 220-lbs. but her excess skin that leaves her in pain.

programs.title: Skin Tight
programs.desc: Holly lost 200 pounds after a life of abuse, but now excess skin keeps her from the wedding of her dreams; a health scare could affect Mark's upcoming skin removal surgery.
